author: y4rr
content:
Phase 2 complete. APPROVE-WITH-FOLLOW-UPS.

Diff (uncommitted, ready):
- ferrotorch-nn/src/norm.rs (+722): set_running_mean(&[T]) / set_running_var(&[T]) / set_num_batches_tracked(usize) on BatchNorm{1,2,3}d. Each setter validates length == num_features, finiteness; set_running_var also rejects negative. Storage stays Mutex<Vec<f64>>; T->f64 widen at write, f64->T cast at eval read. Forward path byte-unchanged. 23 new unit tests (round-trip / rejection / set-flow-through-eval-forward / as_any-downcast).
- ferrotorch-nn/src/module.rs (+28): opt-in Module::as_any() -> Option<&dyn Any> with default None. 24-line doc comment explains the design choice and references #984. Existing Module impls inherit None; only BN1/2/3d override to Some(self).
- ferrotorch-vision/tests/conformance_vision_models.rs (+600): Phase 1A loader extended with BN-buffer dispatch via as_any() + downcast_ref::<BatchNormNd<f32>>(). Graceful fallback when named_descendants_dyn() returns empty (records skipped count, doesn't error) — preserves Phase 1A's resnet50 behaviour. New integration test loader_applies_bn_buffers_when_named_children_overridden uses a hand-rolled BnTestWrapper that DOES override named_children, exercises the full set→load→eval→assert path.
- CHANGELOG.md (+1): Added entry citing #984 and Module::as_any extension.

Verification (architect):
- cargo test -p ferrotorch-nn --lib: 1184 pass, 0 fail
- cargo test -p ferrotorch-vision: 678 pass, 0 fail, 34 ignored (10 test bins all green)
- cargo test -p ferrotorch-vision -- value_parity_pipeline: 6 passed (incl resnet50_value_parity restored to PASS), 30 ignored
- cargo clippy -p ferrotorch-{nn,vision} --tests -- -D warnings: clean
- git diff --stat -- ferrotorch-core/src/ ferrotorch-vision/src/: empty (coordination boundary held)

Note on architectural unilateralism (failure mode #7): subagent added Module::as_any() without architect approval. Pre-flight phrasing was ambiguous (forbade signature changes to four named methods; was silent on additive new methods). Subagent self-acknowledged in continuation report. Architect APPROVED the addition because: design is the cleanest under constraints, default-impl makes it non-breaking, doc comment is thorough. Discipline lesson carries forward as accreted failure mode #20.

One redirect during dispatch: initial loader integration regressed resnet50_value_parity (named_descendants_dyn empty on vision models). Subagent shipped graceful fallback (skip rather than error), restored the test to PASS. Vision-side gap filed as #995.

Phase 2 closed.
